toolsUsed: docker compose runtime rebuild with explicit Flyway-v2 + MailHog overrides
docker exec psql lifecycle inspection and reversible corruption setup

assertions.title: Supported lifecycle persistence remains compatible with the rollout schema path

steps.action: Inspect the rebuilt compose runtime startup logs
steps.expected: The live validation runtime should boot on the supported Flyway v2 path
steps.observed: `docker compose logs app` showed profiles `prod, flyway-v2`, validated 46 migrations, and reported `Current version of schema "public": 158` before Tomcat started on `8081/9090`.

steps.action: Drive tenant lifecycle mutations through the live super-admin endpoints and inspect persisted storage values in Postgres
steps.expected: API vocabulary remains `SUSPENDED` / `ACTIVE` / `DEACTIVATED` while stored values remain Flyway-v2-compatible (`HOLD` / `ACTIVE` / `BLOCKED`)
steps.observed: As `uat.superadmin@example.com`, `POST /api/v1/superadmin/tenants/2/suspend` returned 200 `Tenant suspended` with `data.status=SUSPENDED` while `companies.lifecycle_state` became `HOLD`; `POST /api/v1/superadmin/tenants/2/activate` returned 200 `Tenant activated` and persisted `ACTIVE`; `POST /api/v1/superadmin/tenants/2/deactivate` returned 200 `Tenant deactivated` with `data.status=DEACTIVATED` while the stored value became `BLOCKED`. The row was restored to `ACTIVE` after the probe.

steps.expected: Lifecycle persistence compatibility coverage passes cleanly
steps.observed: `mvn test -Djacoco.skip=true -pl . '-Dtest=CompanyControllerIT,CompanyServiceTest,TenantLifecycleServiceTest,TenantRuntimeEnforcementServiceTest,TS_RuntimeTenantRuntimeEnforcementTest,RefreshTokenServiceTest'` finished with `BUILD SUCCESS`; 152 tests ran with 0 failures and 0 errors.

tests.result: BUILD SUCCESS; Tests run: 152, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0

assertions.title: Unrecognized stored lifecycle values fail closed

steps.action: Temporarily inject an unsupported lifecycle value into the local validation tenant and probe protected endpoints
steps.expected: User-visible protected work should fail closed instead of treating the tenant as active
steps.observed: After temporarily dropping `chk_companies_lifecycle_state` and setting tenant `UTTAAB2` to `UNSUPPORTED_TEST_STATE`, `GET /api/v1/auth/me` for an existing UTTAAB2 admin bearer token returned 403, and `GET /api/v1/admin/users` returned 403 `ApiResponse` with `code=AUTH_004`, `reason=TENANT_LIFECYCLE_RESTRICTED`, and `reasonDetail=Tenant is deactivated`. The row value and check constraint were then restored to `ACTIVE` / `chk_companies_lifecycle_state`.

steps.action: Cross-check the converter/runtime regression coverage for unknown stored values
steps.expected: Regression tests should confirm unknown lifecycle values map to a fail-closed runtime state
steps.observed: `CompanyLifecycleStateConverterTest.convertToEntityAttribute_failsClosed_forUnknownStoredValue` asserts that `mystery-state` maps to `DEACTIVATED`, and the same 152-test lifecycle-focused Maven subset passed cleanly, covering the runtime enforcement layer alongside the converter/service behavior.

tests.result: BUILD SUCCESS; Tests run: 152, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0

assertions.title: Out-of-scope admin user targets stay indistinguishable from missing IDs

steps.action: Probe an in-scope tenant-admin user-control action on the live API
steps.expected: The tenant admin should keep the allowed in-tenant path
steps.observed: As `ut.taab.admin2@example.com` in `UTTAAB2`, `POST /api/v1/admin/users/8/force-reset-password` returned 200 `ApiResponse<String>` with `message=Password reset link sent` and `data=OK`.

steps.action: Compare foreign-target and missing-target responses on auth-sensitive admin user-control endpoints
steps.expected: Foreign and missing ids should be externally indistinguishable for tenant-admin requests
steps.observed: `POST /api/v1/admin/users/3/force-reset-password` and `POST /api/v1/admin/users/999999/force-reset-password` both returned 400 `User not found` with the same controlled envelope (`success=false`, `message=User not found`, `data.code=VAL_001`, `data.reason=User not found`). `PUT /api/v1/admin/users/3/status` and `PUT /api/v1/admin/users/999999/status` likewise returned the same 400 `User not found` contract.

steps.action: Probe the role-mutation controller guard and re-run the reviewed authz regression suite
steps.expected: Tenant-admin shared-role mutation is denied at the intended boundary while the reviewed authz regressions stay green
steps.observed: Tenant admin `POST /api/v1/admin/roles` with `{name: ROLE_ADMIN, permissions:[factory.dispatch]}` returned 403 `Access denied` with `code=AUTH_004`, confirming the controller guard stops shared-role mutation before service-level validation. A representative allowed super-admin path still succeeded on `POST /api/v1/admin/users/3/force-reset-password` with 200 `Password reset link sent`, and `mvn test -Djacoco.skip=true -pl . '-Dtest=AdminUserSecurityIT,AdminUserServiceTest,AuthTenantAuthorityIT,RoleServiceRbacTenantIsolationTest,TenantAdminProvisioningServiceTest'` finished with `BUILD SUCCESS`; 69 tests ran with 0 failures and 0 errors.

tests.result: BUILD SUCCESS; Tests run: 69, Failures: 0, Errors: 0, Skipped: 0

assertions.title: Frontend update v2 tracking exists for current and future frontend-impacting changes

steps.action: Review `docs/frontend-update-v2/README.md` and the review-followup feature notes
steps.expected: The dedicated tracker should exist and explicitly record both frontend-impacting and no-op entries for this milestone
steps.observed: `docs/frontend-update-v2/README.md` exists and lists both `tenant-lifecycle-rollout-safety-hardening` and `masked-admin-target-lookup-hardening` in the per-change tracker. The lifecycle row marks `Frontend action = None` / `No frontend code change required`, and the masked-target row marks `Frontend action = Review only` with the note to treat foreign-target and missing-target 400s the same.

steps.action: Read the dedicated per-feature follow-up notes for the current milestone
steps.expected: Each current feature note should explicitly call out whether frontend work is needed
steps.observed: `docs/frontend-update-v2/tenant-lifecycle-rollout-safety-hardening.md` explicitly says no auth/admin/lifecycle request or response shapes changed and no frontend code change is required. `docs/frontend-update-v2/masked-admin-target-lookup-hardening.md` explicitly says no request-body or success-response shapes changed and explains the intentional masked 400 behavior without requiring new frontend code beyond treating foreign and missing targets the same.

frictions.description: Launching the delegated `user-testing-flow-validator` subagent failed immediately with `Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.4-high`.
frictions.resolution: Fell back to direct in-session validation, consistent with mission guidance and the existing helper-failure note in `.factory/library/user-testing.md`.

frictions.description: The compose-backed runtime initially served a stale app image after `docker compose up -d app`.
frictions.resolution: Rebuilt and restarted the app with the explicit override command plus `--build`; the updated runtime then exposed the reviewed masking and lifecycle behavior. `.factory/library/user-testing.md` was updated to preserve this startup requirement.

frictions.description: The local `companies` table check constraint prevented direct insertion of an unsupported lifecycle value for the fail-closed runtime probe.
frictions.resolution: Temporarily dropped `chk_companies_lifecycle_state`, inserted the unsupported value for the isolated tenant probe, captured the protected-endpoint denials, then restored both the row value and the check constraint.

summary: Validated all four review-followup-hardening assertions directly in-session after the delegated flow-validator launch failed. The rebuilt compose runtime showed Flyway-v2 startup, super-admin lifecycle mutations persisted `HOLD` / `ACTIVE` / `BLOCKED` while keeping the existing API vocabulary, protected UTTAAB2 requests failed closed when an unsupported stored lifecycle value was injected, tenant-admin foreign vs missing user-control targets now return indistinguishable 400 envelopes, shared-role mutation is denied at the intended boundary, and `docs/frontend-update-v2/` explicitly tracks the milestone’s no-op and review-only frontend follow-up items.
